summary: After winning the pet festival with Tangy, the player known as 'Alley Boss' receives crucial intelligence regarding the rebel organization Alkill. He decides to capitalize on their weakened state by securing an agreement with the guild 'Red Bull America' to enter the disputed Kunta Plateau. While attempting to initiate his plan, he is confronted by members of the Mano guild, prompting him to begin a live stream of his inevitable conflict with them.
key_moments: Alley Boss wins the pet contest and acquires intelligence about the rebel group Alkill.
Alley Boss negotiates with Mascherano of Red Bull America to gain entry to the Kunta Plateau.
Alley Boss confronts members of the Mano guild and begins a live stream to document the encounter.
